title: VA SUICIDE PREVENTION TEAM - 211info
text: VA PORTLAND COMMUNITY RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CENTER VA SUICIDE PREVENTION TEAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to resources for individuals in crisis situations. 308 SW 1st Avenue Suite 155 Portland, OR 972043432 Eligibility: Individuals who are veterans and their friends and families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week 988 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline 988 ext 1 Veterans Suicide Crisis Line Message Phone (503) 402-2857 Portland area only Text Short Code 838255 Veterans Crisis Text Service INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website for online chat service FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1st and Oak Street MAX stop Services: Veteran/Military Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - VA COMMUNITY RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VA PORTLAND COMMUNITY RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CENTER
